contents.rollMessage:
%{ let act=entity; let u={'system.props.grit_used':false}; let s=['bash','dash','sneak','shoot','think','sway','loot']; for(let k of s){ u['system.props.'+k+'_current'] = act.system.props[k+'_initial']||4; } await act.update(u); let f="

Catch Your Breath

Stats and Grit restored.

Warning: GM introduces a Consequence.

"; ChatMessage.create({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), content:f}); return false; }%

%{ let act=entity; let u={'system.props.grit_used':false}; let s=['bash','dash','sneak','shoot','think','sway','loot']; for(let k of s){ u['system.props.'+k+'_current'] = act.system.props[k+'_initial']||4; } await act.update(u); let f="

Safe Rest

Stats and Grit restored.

GM determines if any Harm is cleared.

"; ChatMessage.create({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), content:f}); return false; }%

%{ let act=entity; let c=parseInt(act.system.props.bash_current)||4; let steps=[4,6,8,10,12]; if(!steps.includes(c)) c=4; let showRoll=async(dieStep, posName)=>{ let rl=await new Roll('1d'+dieStep).evaluate(); let r=rl.total; let m=r<=2?'Failure. Consequence!':(r<=4?'Partial Success.':'Full Success!'); let n=c>=12?10:c>=10?8:c>=8?6:4; await act.update({'system.props.bash_current':n}); let f="

BASH (d"+dieStep+") - "+posName+"

Result: "+r+"

"+m+"

Stat stepped down to d"+n+"

"; rl.toMessage({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), flavor:f}); }; new Dialog({title:'POSITION', content:'', buttons:{adv:{label:'GOOD (+2)', callback:()=>showRoll(steps[Math.min(steps.indexOf(c)+1, 4)], 'Good')}, norm:{label:'STANDARD', callback:()=>showRoll(c, 'Standard')}, dis:{label:'BAD (-2)', callback:()=>showRoll(steps[Math.max(steps.indexOf(c)-1, 0)], 'Bad')}}}).render(true); return false; }%

%{ let act=entity; let c=parseInt(act.system.props.dash_current)||4; let steps=[4,6,8,10,12]; if(!steps.includes(c)) c=4; let showRoll=async(dieStep, posName)=>{ let rl=await new Roll('1d'+dieStep).evaluate(); let r=rl.total; let m=r<=2?'Failure. Result: "+r+"

"+m+"

Stat stepped down to d"+n+"

"; rl.toMessage({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), flavor:f}); }; new Dialog({title:'POSITION', content:'', buttons:{adv:{label:'GOOD (+2)', callback:()=>showRoll(steps[Math.min(steps.indexOf(c)+1, 4)], 'Good')}, norm:{label:'STANDARD', callback:()=>showRoll(c, 'Standard')}, dis:{label:'BAD (-2)', callback:()=>showRoll(steps[Math.max(steps.indexOf(c)-1, 0)], 'Bad')}}}).render(true); return false; }%

%{ let act=entity; let c=parseInt(act.system.props.loot_current)||12; let steps=[4,6,8,10,12]; if(!steps.includes(c)) c=4; let showRoll=async()=>{ let rl=await new Roll('1d'+c).evaluate(); let r=rl.total; let m=r<=2?'Failure. Find nothing & suffer Consequence.':(r<=4?'Partial Success. Inferior Item.':'Full Success! Found an Item.'); let n=c>=12?10:c>=10?8:c>=8?6:4; await act.update({'system.props.loot_current':n}); let f="

LOOT (d"+c+")

Result: "+r+"

"+m+"

Loot Skill stepped down to d"+n+"

"; rl.toMessage({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), flavor:f}); }; showRoll(); return false; }%

%{ let act=entity; if(act.system.props.grit_used) { ui.notifications.warn('Grit already used!'); return false; } let c=parseInt(act.system.props.grit_initial)||12; let showRoll=async()=>{ let rl=await new Roll('1d'+c).evaluate(); let r=rl.total; let m=r<=2?'Failure. Suffer consequence.':(r<=4?'Partial Success. Mitigated.':'Full Success! Avoid consequence.'); await act.update({'system.props.grit_used':true}); let f="

GRIT (d"+c+")

Result: "+r+"

"+m+"

Grit is now used.

"; rl.toMessage({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), flavor:f}); }; showRoll(); return false; }%

rowLayout.rollMessage:
%{ let act=entity; let iname="${sameRow('item_name')}$"||'Item'; let tbl=act.system.props.items_table||{}; let rk=Object.keys(tbl).find(k=>tbl[k] && tbl[k].item_name===iname); if(!rk) return false; let row=tbl[rk]; if(row.item_depleted) { ui.notifications.warn('Item is Depleted!'); return false; } let c=parseInt(row.item_current)||4; let steps=[4,6,8,10,12]; if(!steps.includes(c)) c=4; let showRoll=async()=>{ let rl=await new Roll('1d'+c).evaluate(); let r=rl.total; let m=''; let ns=row.item_stressed; let nd=false; let nc=c; if(r<=2){ if(ns || c===4){ nd=true; m='Failure. Item is Depleted!'; } else { nc=steps[Math.max(steps.indexOf(c)-1, 0)]; m='Failure. Step down to d'+nc+'.'; } } else if(r<=4){ if(ns){ nd=true; m='Partial. Second Stress: Item is Depleted!'; } else { ns=true; m='Partial. Item is Stressed.'; } } else { m='Success! Item intact.'; } let upd={}; upd['system.props.items_table.'+rk+'.item_current']=nc; upd['system.props.items_table.'+rk+'.item_stressed']=ns; upd['system.props.items_table.'+rk+'.item_depleted']=nd; await act.update(upd); let f="

"+iname+" (d"+c+")

Result: "+r+"

"+m+"

"; rl.toMessage({speaker:ChatMessage.getSpeaker({actor:act}), flavor:f}); }; showRoll(); return false; }%
